mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fine_record (borrow_id, user_id, book_id, overdue_days, fine_amount, payment_status) VALUES (#{borrowId}, #{userId}, #{bookId}, #{overdueDays}, #{fineAmount}, #{paymentStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT fr.*, u.username, u.real_name, u.student_no, b.title AS book_title, b.isbn FROM fine_record fr LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON fr.user_id = u.id AND u.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN book_info b ON fr.book_id = b.id AND b.is_deleted = 0 WHERE fr.id = #{id} AND fr.is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM fine_record WHERE borrow_id = #{borrowId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE fine_record SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE fine_record SET overdue_days = #{overdueDays}, fine_amount = #{fineAmount}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(fine_amount), 0) FROM fine_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND payment_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(fine_amount), 0) FROM fine_record WHERE payment_status = 0 AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT CASE payment_status WHEN 0 THEN '未缴纳' WHEN 1 THEN '已缴纳' ELSE '未知' END AS name, COUNT(*) AS value, COALESCE(SUM(fine_amount), 0) AS total_amount FROM fine_record WHERE is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY payment_status
